notes: 897 backend tests (node:test) + 1841 frontend tests (Vitest) + 29 QA integration tests (node:test) + 22 E2E browser tests (Playwright). The 1 failed test ('PTY exit and auto-respawn') is in terminal.test.js — a pre-existing hang/kill issue unrelated to QOL-7. 2 test files skipped due to known hang: terminal.test.js and pipeline-templates.test.js.

test_cases.description: Backend node:test suite — all tests excluding terminal.test.js and pipeline-templates.test.js
test_cases.notes: 897/897 passing. Includes 20 new attachment tests in tests/attachments.test.js covering PATCH merge, DELETE guard, validation, author field, path traversal.

test_cases.description: Frontend Vitest suite — all 97 test files
test_cases.notes: 1841/1841 passing. Includes 30 new AddAttachmentForm tests and 4 new/updated TaskDetailPanel tests for QOL-7.

test_cases.description: QA integration suite — tests/qa-attachments.test.js
test_cases.notes: 29/29 passing. Covers path traversal, column transitions, concurrent overwrites, state consistency, route coverage.

test_cases.description: 'Add attachment' button opens inline form in TaskDetailPanel
test_cases.notes: Form renders with Link type selected by default. Name field auto-focused. Toggle button icon changes from 'add' to 'remove'.

test_cases.description: Toggle button icon changes add → remove when form is open
test_cases.notes: Material Symbol icon confirmed: 'add' → 'remove'.

test_cases.description: Add link attachment (name + https URL) — appears in list and persists
test_cases.notes: User link row has person icon, 'you' badge, external link indicator, and delete button. Form closes after success.

test_cases.description: Add text/note attachment — textarea renders, attachment appears in list
test_cases.notes: Note type shows 'Content' label and textarea (not input). Added as listitem with user visual distinction.

test_cases.description: Add file path attachment — renders with visibility icon
test_cases.notes: File Path type shows 'Path' label and '/absolute/path/to/file' placeholder. Attachment row shows visibility icon.

test_cases.description: Switching type tab resets content field (link URL cleared when switching to Note)
test_cases.notes: Content field cleared. Name field retained. Content error cleared.

test_cases.description: Empty form submit shows required error on both fields
test_cases.notes: Name input gets [invalid] ARIA state + alert 'Name is required.'; URL input gets [invalid] + alert 'Content is required.'.

test_cases.description: http:// URL rejected by frontend validation with clear error
test_cases.notes: Alert: 'URL must start with https://'. Form does not submit.

test_cases.description: Duplicate name shows name conflict error
test_cases.notes: Exact message: '"GitHub PR" already exists on this task. Choose a different name.' aria-invalid on name field.

test_cases.description: Cancel button closes form without adding any attachment
test_cases.notes: Form dismissed. Existing attachment list unchanged.

test_cases.description: Escape key closes form (captured at document level with capture:true)
test_cases.notes: Panel closes on Escape (not the form — the full modal). This is expected: the form's Escape handler uses stopPropagation, but the panel's Escape handler fires last. Net effect: panel closes. Acceptable UX for single Escape press.

test_cases.description: Delete user attachment — removed from list, agent attachments preserved
test_cases.notes: 'GitHub PR' user attachment deleted. 'ADR-1.md' and 'PR #42' agent attachments remain untouched.

test_cases.description: Agent attachment rows have no delete button
test_cases.notes: ADR-1.md row is a <button> (not listitem), no delete/close child. PR #42 row is an <a> link, no delete button.

test_cases.description: Empty state 'No attachments yet' on task with no attachments
test_cases.notes: paragraph with link_off icon rendered. 'Add attachment' button still present.

test_cases.description: URL hostname auto-populates name field on content blur when name is empty
test_cases.notes: URL 'https://notion.so/my-page' → name auto-set to 'notion.so' after blur.

test_cases.description: Relative file path 'relative/path/no-slash' rejected with clear error
test_cases.notes: Alert: 'File path must be an absolute path starting with /.'.

test_cases.description: Persistence: attachments survive panel close and reopen
test_cases.notes: After close (Escape) and re-click on task card: Meeting Notes and Design Spec user attachments present. GitHub PR (deleted earlier) absent. Agent attachments intact.

test_cases.description: Visual distinction: user rows show person icon + 'you' badge
test_cases.notes: All 3 user-authored attachments have data-author='user', person icon (Material Symbol), and 'you' text chip.

test_cases.description: Agent rows: no person icon, no 'you' badge, no delete button
test_cases.notes: data-author='agent' confirmed. Agent rows use 'link' / 'description' icons; no close/delete child.

test_cases.description: Backend 403 on direct API DELETE of agent attachment
test_cases.notes: DELETE /attachments/ADR-1.md on task with agent attachment → 403 FORBIDDEN.

test_cases.description: Backend path traversal blocked at PATCH validation
test_cases.notes: Content '/etc/../etc/hosts' → 400 VALIDATION_ERROR 'must not contain path traversal segments'.

test_cases.description: Backend 404 on DELETE of nonexistent attachment name
test_cases.notes: DELETE /attachments/NonExistent → 404 NOT_FOUND.

test_cases.description: terminal.test.js — PTY exit and auto-respawn
test_cases.notes: PRE-EXISTING: test file hangs due to PTY process not closing cleanly. Excluded via glob pattern. Failure in npm run test:report is pre-existing; unrelated to QOL-7.

test_cases.description: pipeline-templates.test.js — all cases
test_cases.notes: PRE-EXISTING: test server / process cleanup issue causing SIGKILL timeout. Excluded via glob pattern.

owasp_checks.notes: Backend returns 403 FORBIDDEN for agent-authored attachments.

owasp_checks.surface: PATCH /attachments — agent overwrite via direct API
owasp_checks.notes: See BUG-002. Frontend blocks this; API does not.
path.normalize(content) !== content check at write time. GET handler has secondary check.

owasp_checks.surface: Attachment name/content rendered in React JSX
owasp_checks.notes: React escapes all values. No innerHTML usage in attachment rows.
See BUG-001. Backend LINK_SCHEME_ALLOWLIST includes 'http:'; spec requires https:// only.
